title: Plutarch, Moralia: Whether an Old Man Should Engage in Public Affairs
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether an Old Man Should Engage in Public Affairs.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether an Old Man Should Engage in Public Affairs.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Whether an Old Man Should Engage in Public Affairs': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
